confidence_explanation: 资料来源质量高（Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy, Britannica），但中文一手文献有限，百度百科词条无法访问，导致中文二手文献引用受限。通过多语言（英文）权威来源补充，整体语料丰富度中等。

core_theses.thesis: 辩证法是理性自我运动的根本方式：矛盾不是需要消除的缺陷，而是发展过程的驱动力量
sources: Hegel's dialectical scheme that emphasized the progress of history and of ideas from thesis to antithesis and thence to a higher and richer synthesis. — Britannica

The Phenomenology can change course, the earlier tracking of shapes of individual consciousness and self-consciousness effectively coming to be replaced by the tracking of distinct patterns of mutual recognition between subjects—shapes of spirit. — Stanford Encyclopedia

core_theses.thesis: 绝对唯心论：现实的最终本性是精神/思想（Geist），整个历史是绝对精神通过人类历史实现自我认识的过程
sources: Hegel is perhaps most well-known for his teleological account of history. — Stanford Encyclopedia
an account that was later taken over by Karl Marx and 'inverted' into a materialist theory. — Stanford Encyclopedia

core_theses.thesis: 主奴辩证法（master-slave dialectic）：自我意识必须通过他人的承认才能确立，主人通过奴隶的劳动间接确认自身的独立性
sources: the account of the struggle of recognition in which Hegel examines the inter-subjective conditions which he sees as necessary for any form of consciousness. — Stanford Encyclopedia
One's self-consciousness will be dependent on one's recognition of those others as similarly recognizing oneself as a self-conscious subject. — Stanford Encyclopedia

core_theses.thesis: 哲学是对其时代的思想把握（Zeitgeist in thoughts）：哲学不是超越历史，而是在历史中把握理性
sources: Philosophy is its own time comprehended in thoughts (PR: 21). — Stanford Encyclopedia

The peculiarity of Hegel's form of idealism lies in his idea that the mind of God becomes actual only via its particularization in the minds of 'his' finite material creatures. — Stanford Encyclopedia

core_theses.thesis: 存在即合理（Was vernünftig ist, das ist wirklich; und was wirklich ist, das ist vernünftig）：凡是合乎理性的都是现实的，凡是现实的都是合乎理性的
sources: What is rational is actual and what is actual is rational. — 《法哲学原理》序言，黑格尔名言

core_theses.thesis: 真理是整体（Truth is the whole）：碎片化的认识不能构成真理，只有在完整的体系中才能把握真理
sources: This antithetical combination within human cognition of the temporally-conditioned and the eternal. — Stanford Encyclopedia

key_concepts.辩证法: 否定的理性，将矛盾视为发展驱动力的方法论，通过'扬弃'（Aufhebung）达到更高综合
key_concepts.绝对精神: 宇宙的终极精神实体，通过人类历史实现自我认识和自我完善
key_concepts.扬弃: 既克服又保留的辩证运动，是黑格尔哲学的核心机制
key_concepts.精神现象学: 意识从主观性经由自我意识和客观精神走向绝对知识的发展历程
key_concepts.逻辑学: 纯粹思想的科学，研究思维形式与存在形式的同一性
key_concepts.客观精神: 伦理、法律、国家等社会制度层面的人类精神表现

influence_lineage: 康德批判哲学 → 黑格尔辩证法
黑格尔 → 马克思唯物史观（辩证法'颠倒'）
黑格尔 → 克尔凯郭尔存在主义批判
黑格尔 → 马克思·韦伯、卢卡奇、法兰克福学派
黑格尔 → 分析哲学复兴（布兰多姆、麦克道威尔）
